_note: Materializes the ADR-0052 cost-tier table for the kit's own agents. The resolver (contextkit/tools/scripts/model-policy.mjs) reads THIS file; tools/selfcheck-model-policy.mjs asserts it agrees, agent-by-agent, with the host-enforced `model:` frontmatter under templates/claude/agents/. Changing an agent's tier means amending ADR-0052 AND this file AND the frontmatter — the selfcheck refuses any drift between the three. Aliases only; concrete model IDs + prices live in the dated capability-matrix.json (supply side).
_hostNote: hostModels maps the demand tiers to the model override each host can enforce; Codex uses GPT model ids, while Antigravity remains an explicit host gap.

think.note: design / review / security / root-cause / planning — keep the agent's tier (orchestrator may bump one above for genuinely hard design).

execute.note: tests from a given plan / mechanical refactor / scaffold / format / summarize — drop to the cheap tier; QA gates catch regressions.

ambiguous.note: no LLM-judge per dispatch — fall back to the agent's static default.
